blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
